blocks.text: How to play:Watch the squares light up — then repeat the pattern back. See how far you can get.

blocks.caption: Simon Says — a pattern memory game

exercises.title: The game's code
tasks: Three files make this game work. Toggle between them and explore.
Try editing the colors (lines 2-17) in the style.css file — your changes update the game live.
Try editing the spacing in line 19.
